3274540.name: MOTHERED - DEMO + [HOME]
3274540.description:
A DEMO FOR NEW PLAYERS...:
MOTHERED - DEMO is a first-person horror adventure game with point-and-click mechanics, set in a familiar yet eerily unnatural depiction of [HOME]. Players who have not already completed MOTHERED - A ROLE-PLAYING HORROR GAME will experience the first couple of days, where they will play play the role of [LIANA] - a young girl who's arrived [HOME] to stay with her mother after having undergone major surgery.

...AND A SEQUEL FOR RETURNING PLAYERS:Loading up this game after completing the full version of MOTHERED - A ROLE-PLAYING HORROR GAME will bring you to MOTHERED - [HOME] - an entirely new standalone sequel which takes place within the familiar old cycle you're used to, but this time, offering an experience unlike anything you've ever played before. This is an absolutely essential chapter in the larger ENIGMA trilogy that you cannot miss.Why have you come back here? Even after everything you've been through - something has pulled you back [HOME], forcing you back into this painful old cycle.
Although, this is not how you [REMEMBER] it at all?
Is this all just an [ECHO] of [WHAT HAPPENED]?
It seems like somebody is trying to reach you.
You'd better not keep [HER] waiting.

FEATURING:

  • A dense, engaging narrative that gradually reveals itself over the course of 7 days, each with a morning, afternoon, evening and night time.

  • A different experience based on whether you've already completed the full game or not.

  • An immersive, tense atmosphere that changes based on your completion of the main game.

  • A vital chapter in the larger ENIGMA TRILOGY narrative, leading right up to the events of [ECHOSTASIS].
3274540.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
